---
title: Hmmmm
---

All murmurings.

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
dirs <- list.dirs(".", recursive = FALSE, full.names = FALSE)
dirs <- sort(dirs[file.exists(file.path(dirs, "index.Rmd"))], decreasing = TRUE)

# Staged release: hide posts whose folder date hasn't arrived yet.
# (Deployment also excludes these folders — see .github/workflows/deploy.yml —
# so unpublished posts are neither listed nor reachable by direct URL.)
dir_dates <- as.Date(substr(dirs, 1, 10), format = "%Y-%m-%d")
dirs <- dirs[is.na(dir_dates) | dir_dates <= Sys.Date()]

year <- NULL

pre_theme <- NULL
for (dir in dirs) {
  lines <- readLines(file.path(dir, "index.Rmd"), n = 30, warn = FALSE)
  delims <- which(lines == "---")
  if (length(delims) < 2) next
  yaml_lines <- lines[(delims[1] + 1):(delims[2] - 1)]
  title <- sub('^title:\\s*[\'"]?(.+?)[\'"]?\\s*$', "\\1",
               grep("^title:", yaml_lines, value = TRUE)[1])
  date  <- sub("^date:\\s*(.+?)\\s*$", "\\1",
               grep("^date:", yaml_lines, value = TRUE)[1])
  
  theme <- sub('^theme:\\s*[\'"]?(.+?)[\'"]?\\s*$', "\\1",
               grep("^theme:", yaml_lines, value = TRUE)[1])

  post_year <- strsplit(date,'-',3)[[1]][1]|>
    as.numeric()
  
  if(is.null(year) || post_year!= year){
    
    year <- post_year
    
    cat(sprintf("## %s\n",year))
  }
  
  if(!is.na(theme) & (is.null(pre_theme)||pre_theme!=theme)){
  
    pre_theme = theme
    
    cat(sprintf("### %s\n",theme))
  
  }
  
  cat(sprintf("*[%s](%s/index.html)* &mdash; %s<br>", title, dir, date))
}
```
